title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.343 - Records to be maintained and be available for board inspection
text:
338.343.  Records to be maintained and be available for board inspection. — Any licensee licensed under the provisions of sections 338.330 to 338.340 must maintain required records to guarantee security, storage and accountability.  These records shall be available for inspection by the board.
(L. 1989 S.B. 39 § 338.370, A.L. 1993 S.B. 27)
